# `/stopsound` Command
Stops a sound.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/stopsound <player: target> [sound: string]`

## Arguments
- `player`: target
- `sound`: string
